scripts.postbuild: cp -rn dist/client/* dist/ && rm -rf dist/client && echo "export default { async fetch(request, env, context) { try { const res = await env.ASSETS.fetch(request); if (res.status < 400) return res; } catch (e) {} const entry = await import('./server/entry.mjs'); return entry.default.fetch(request, env, context); } };" > dist/_worker.js && rm -f dist/server/wrangler.json
